case_title: MIDLAND FUNDING LLC ASSIGNEE OF EMERGE MASTERCARD VS. MICHAEL ROSS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2010 CONTINUED TO MAY-05-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR MAR-03-2010 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAY-05-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
